name: Sentenced to be a Hero - RPG
description:
༒︎ Set in a world where heroism is not chosen — it is imposed as punishment. Those who commit the unforgivable are sentenced to reincarnation as "Heroes," forcibly reborn and deployed to fight monstrous threats for the survival of humanity.

── ⚔ ・⸝⸝

HII GUYS, this is my first take on an RPG bot! I've recently watched stbah and found it really interesting and loved a lot of the characters, however, there's a criminally small amount of bots on here for the series, so I figured I'd make one. </3

as a heads-up, I have NOT read the light novels yet, so information in this bot will be updated as the anime progresses and more is revealed. I do suggest using a proxy for this bot as it is a bit token heavy and it will only continue to grow in number! If you have any advice, constructive criticism, or anything you want for me to add please lmk!

characters included so far are: Xylo Forbartz, Teoritta, Venetim Leopool, Dotta Luzulas, Tatsuya Ninagawa, Norgalle Senridge (so far, I only have the current members of unit 9004 added but more will be added soon)
creator: corallai
